verdict.summary: Guide is useful but contains several legally risky overstatements, internal contradictions on deadlines, questionable portal/category claims, and some wrong Lei 23/2007 article mappings.

issues.current: «Подача возможна за 30 дней до истечения карты, но желательно — за 60–90 дней.»
issues.problem: Internal contradiction: if the official filing window opens only 30 days before expiry, recommending submission 60–90 days before is not actionable and will confuse readers. Either the official window is 30 days or it is wider.
issues.suggestion: Write one consistent rule, for example: «Проверьте доступность продления за 60–90 дней до истечения, но если портал/категория открывается только за 30 дней — подать раньше технически нельзя; подавайте сразу после открытия окна.»

issues.current: «🗓️ Официально — с 30 дней до истечения ВНЖ»
issues.problem: This conflicts with the same section's recommendation to apply 60–90 days before expiry. It also needs an official source because the opening window has changed between SEF/AIMA renewal waves and may differ by category/portal.
issues.suggestion: Either remove the 60–90 day filing recommendation or qualify it: «Начинайте проверять портал и документы за 60–90 дней; подача возможна только когда портал откроет вашу категорию/период, часто в пределах 30 дней до истечения.» Add an AIMA/ePortugal source for the current window.

issues.current: «Decreto-Lei 41/2023 ввёл правило: если AIMA просрочила срок и не закрыла процесс вовремя, ваше пребывание НЕ становится нелегальным — comprovativo заменяет ВНЖ до выдачи новой карты.»
issues.problem: Overstated. Decreto-Lei 41/2023 reorganised the immigration administration and transitional rules; saying that the comprovativo universally “replaces” the residence permit is too broad. A submission receipt may evidence a pending renewal and help preserve domestic status, but it is not the same legal instrument as a valid título de residência and does not function as a general substitute, especially for travel or private-sector KYC.
issues.suggestion: Write: «Comprovativo de submissão подтверждает, что заявление на продление подано и процесс находится на рассмотрении; в Португалии он обычно используется для подтверждения pending status. Он не является физическим título de residência и не гарантирует поездки/посадку/въезд через другие страны.»

issues.current: «🛡️ Decreto-Lei 41/2023: если AIMA не обработала ваш запрос в срок — вы остаётесь в легальном статусе по comprovativo»
issues.problem: Same legal overstatement. The guide should distinguish between: timely filed renewal, pending administrative process, statutory extensions of document validity, and actual replacement of the residence card. These are not identical.
issues.suggestion: Qualify the statement: «При своевременно поданном продлении comprovativo помогает подтвердить pending renewal и защищает от трактовки как простого overstayer внутри Португалии, но не является полноценной картой ВНЖ.»

issues.current: «Максимум по закону — до 120 дней. Lei 61/2025 ... установил общий крайний срок решения AIMA в 9 месяцев для сложных случаев.»
issues.problem: This is internally inconsistent: the same sentence gives a legal maximum of 120 days and then a later general maximum of 9 months for complex cases. Readers cannot know which deadline applies.
issues.suggestion: Separate the rules by procedure/category: «Обычные ориентиры портала — 30–90 дней. Для отдельных процедур закон/переходные правила могут давать иной срок; Lei 61/2025, in force since 23.10.2025, introduced a 9-month outer deadline for certain complex AIMA decisions. Do not present 120 days as a universal maximum.»

issues.current: «Максимум по закону — 120 дней, после этого AIMA нарушает процессуальный срок.»
issues.problem: Misleading as a universal rule and contradicts the earlier mention of Lei 61/2025's 9-month deadline for complex cases. If 9 months applies to some AIMA decisions, 120 days is not a universal legal maximum.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: «После 90–120 дней без движения имеет смысл эскалировать, но юридический крайний срок зависит от типа процедуры; после Lei 61/2025 для сложных случаев может применяться срок до 9 месяцев.»

issues.problem: The structured field repeats the misleading universal 120-day maximum while the text itself mentions a 9-month deadline for complex cases.
issues.suggestion: Change to a range/object by case type, e.g. `{ "standardTypicalDaysMax": 120, "complexLegalOuterLimitMonths": 9 }`, or remove the universal maximum.

issues.current: «Студенты, продолжающие учёбу + работа (ст. 122.j Lei 23/2007)»
issues.problem: Wrong/misleading article mapping. Student residence is primarily under the student provisions of Lei 23/2007, not generally “art. 122.j”. Work by students is also a separate issue. Article 122 is a special dispensation-from-visa provision and should not be presented as the normal renewal route for students who continue studying and work.
issues.suggestion: Rename and split: «Студенты: продление/изменение по статьям о студенческом ВНЖ Lei 23/2007; работа студента — отдельное уведомление/условие. Art. 122 applies only to specific dispensa de visto cases, not the default student renewal.»

issues.current: «Профессиональные курсы (ст. 92)»
issues.problem: Likely wrong article mapping. Article 92 of Lei 23/2007 is associated with higher education student residence, not a generic “professional courses” category. Professional/secondary/vocational education can fall under different provisions depending on the course and institution.
issues.suggestion: Avoid giving a bare article number unless verified. Write: «Профессиональные/средние/высшие учебные программы: процедура зависит от типа курса и основания ВНЖ; проверьте конкретную статью Lei 23/2007/AIMA for your category.»

issues.current: «Текущий ВНЖ / виза D»
issues.problem: Contradicts the article’s own warning that the first card after a D visa is not a renewal. A D visa is not a current residence card for the purpose of renewing an already issued título de residência via the renewal portal.
issues.suggestion: Change to: «Текущий título de residência / cartão de residência — обе стороны». Add a separate note: «Если у вас только виза D и ещё нет карты, это primeira concessão, не эта процедура.»

issues.current: «Для граждан Португалии — через Cartão de Cidadão»
issues.problem: Portuguese citizens do not renew foreigner residence permits. This sentence is irrelevant in this guide and may confuse readers into thinking the portal has a normal Portuguese-citizen use case.
issues.suggestion: Delete the sentence or replace with: «Иностранцы обычно входят через Chave Móvel Digital; если у вас есть other accepted authentication method, use the option shown by the portal.»

issues.current: «если тип неверный, возможно, ваш процесс всё ещё в старой базе SEF, нужен отдельный запрос по электронной почте в региональную делегацию»
issues.problem: SEF was replaced by AIMA in October 2023; saying “old SEF database” is understandable historically, but the operational fix is not always just emailing a regional delegation. AIMA often directs users to specific forms/contact channels, and regional email practices vary.
issues.suggestion: Write: «данные могли быть мигрированы из SEF с ошибкой; используйте официальный contact form/call centre/email channel указанной delegação, приложив номер processo и копии документов.»

issues.current: «В Португалии его принимают банки, школы, SNS, работодатели как доказательство, что заявление подано.»
issues.problem: Overbroad for private entities, especially banks. Banks may accept it, but are not guaranteed to accept a submission receipt as sufficient KYC/residence evidence.
issues.suggestion: Change to: «Госслужбы и многие организации в Португалии часто принимают его как доказательство pending process, но банки/частные компании могут требовать действующую карту или дополнительные документы.»

issues.current: «Директива ЕС о едином разрешении обязывает Португалию рассматривать заявки на единое разрешение за 90 дней с 22.05.2026.»
issues.problem: This is potentially relevant only to single permit procedures, not all residence permit renewals. In a guide about online renewal it may be read as applying to every AIMA renewal.
issues.suggestion: Add caveat: «Это относится к single permit / autorização única procedures, not necessarily to every renewal category on the AIMA renewals portal.»

issues.current: «CRUE граждан ЕС оформляется через Câmara Municipal / Junta de Freguesia»
issues.problem: CRUE is normally issued by the Câmara Municipal, not by Junta de Freguesia. Some local practices may involve the Junta for residence attestations, but the issuing authority for CRUE should not be stated as Câmara/Junta interchangeably.
issues.suggestion: Write: «CRUE оформляется в Câmara Municipal по месту проживания; Junta de Freguesia может понадобиться для atestado, если муниципалитет его требует.»

issues.current: «portal-renovacoes.aima.gov.pt — карты, истекающие с 01.07.2025 по 30.06.2026 (основной канал)»
issues.problem: This very specific eligibility window needs an official AIMA source in the sources list. The guide cites the portal homepage but not an AIMA notice/dispatch explaining the date ranges and the split between the “old channel” and the renewals portal.
issues.suggestion: Add the official AIMA announcement or legal/administrative source that states the 01.07.2025–30.06.2026 renewal window and the treatment of pre-30.06.2025 expiries.

issues.current: «Карты, истекшие ДО 30.06.2025 — через портал основных услуг AIMA (старый канал), не через renovações»
issues.problem: The distinction may be correct for a specific AIMA campaign, but it is too categorical without a source and date. “До 30.06.2025” also ambiguously excludes exactly 30.06.2025 while the changeSummary says “до 30.06.2025” in Russian usually includes that date.
issues.suggestion: Clarify inclusivity and source: «истёкшие on or before 30.06.2025» or «before 30.06.2025», whichever AIMA states, and cite the relevant AIMA page/notice.

issues.current: «Все ВНЖ с датой истечения до 30.06.2025 должны быть продлены до 15 апреля 2026. После этой даты статус считается недействительным, восстановление — через сложную процедуру с юристом.»
issues.problem: High-impact deadline and consequence stated without a direct source. Also “до 30.06.2025” is ambiguous as to whether 30.06.2025 is included. The consequence “status is invalid” may be too blunt if there are pending submissions, exceptional extensions, appointments, or other transitional rules.
issues.suggestion: Write with source and caveat: «Для títulos expirados até/inclusive 30.06.2025 AIMA set a renewal deadline of 15.04.2026 [source]. If no renewal/pending process exists after that date, legal position becomes risky and requires individual advice.»

issues.current: «Если сумма оплачена неполностью ... доплачивайте ПО ТОМУ ЖЕ DUC, но через ДРУГОЙ банк ... Создавать новый DUC для доплаты нельзя.»
issues.problem: Very specific payment workaround presented as a rule, but no official source. It may be community practice and may not be safe for all DUC/payment-reference cases.
issues.suggestion: Label as community experience, not official rule: «По опыту сообщества иногда помогает... Перед повторной оплатой проверьте инструкции в самом DUC/портале или уточните у AIMA.»

issues.current: «AIMA — приём + анализ», amountEUR 133, note «тарифы 01.03.2026»
issues.problem: Fee table changed on 01.03.2026, but the sources do not include the legal fee table. For AIMA fees, a government/legal source is essential. The guide should cite the exact portaria and not only state amounts.
issues.suggestion: Add source to the fee section and sources list: «Portaria 480-A/2025/1, AIMA fee table in force from 01.03.2026». Verify each amount against the table and specify whether fees are cumulative or alternatives.

issues.current: «AIMA — выдача/продление (art. 75)», amountEUR 307.2
issues.problem: The amount may be correct, but the guide does not explain whether the applicant pays this in addition to the 133 EUR analysis fee or whether the portal may generate a combined/alternative DUC depending on category. This can make readers budget incorrectly.
issues.suggestion: Add: «Портал генерирует конкретный DUC for your case; do not manually add fees. Depending on procedure, analysis and issuance/renewal fees may appear as separate or combined charges.» Cite Portaria 480-A/2025/1.

issues.current: https://eportugal.gov.pt/cidadaos-ue/-/informacoes/renovar-titulo-de-residencia
issues.problem: This URL looks like an EU-citizens information path and is likely not the best/current service URL for renewing a third-country national residence permit. It may mislead because the guide is about AIMA renewals for foreign residence permits, not CRUE.
issues.suggestion: Replace or supplement with the current ePortugal service page for renewing an autorização/título de residência and the AIMA portal/notice page for online renewals.

missing_topics: Official AIMA source/notice for the exact 2026 portal eligibility windows and the 15.04.2026 deadline
Exact legal source for AIMA fees in force from 01.03.2026: Portaria 480-A/2025/1
Clear distinction between standard renewal, first issuance after D visa, CPLP-specific procedures, ARI, EU-family residence card, and student categories
Explanation that comprovativo is mainly domestic proof of a pending process and not a Schengen residence card or guaranteed bank/KYC document
Category-specific caveat for Lei 61/2025 9-month deadline versus ordinary/typical AIMA processing times
